Looking at your API response, the search endpoint is /provider/all-provider with optional searchTerm filter. Let me integrate it properly.

Step 1: Add to providerApi.ts

ts
export interface AllProvidersResponse {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  data: {
    meta: {
      page: number;
      limit: number;
      total: number;
      totalPage: number;
    };
    result: Array<{
      _id: string;
      user: {
        _id: string;
        isBlocked: boolean;
        isActive: boolean;
      };
      name: string;
      phone: string;
      email: string;
      isIdentificationDocumentApproved: boolean;
      serviceTypes: string[];
      isStripeConnected: boolean;
      createdAt: string;
      updatedAt: string;
      address?: string;
      dateOfBirth?: string;
      profile_image?: string;
      totalTaskCount?: number;
      avgRating?: number;
      totalRatingCount?: number;
      totalJobComplete?: number;
    }>;
  };
}

export interface GetAllProvidersParams {
  searchTerm?: string;
  page?: number;
  limit?: number;
}

// Add inside providerApi.injectEndpoints:
getAllProviders: builder.query<AllProvidersResponse['data'], GetAllProvidersParams>({
  query: (params) => {
    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();
    if (params.searchTerm) queryParams.append('searchTerm', params.searchTerm);
    if (params.page) queryParams.append('page', params.page.toString());
    if (params.limit) queryParams.append('limit', params.limit.toString());
    const queryString = queryParams.toString();
    return `/provider/all-provider${queryString ? `?${queryString}` : ''}`;
  },
  transformResponse: (response: AllProvidersResponse) => response.data,
  providesTags: ['Provider'],
}),

// Add to exports:
export const { useGetProviderByIdQuery, useGetAllProvidersQuery } = providerApi;

Step 2: Create useSearch.ts hook

ts
// hooks/useSearch.ts
import { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useGetAllProvidersQuery } from '@/store/api/providerApi';
import { toFrontendFormat } from '@/utils/serviceTypeMapper';
import { Provider } from '@/types/provider';
import { ServiceType } from '@/types/services';
import { DistanceRange } from '@/types/search/distanceRange';
import { SortOption } from '@/types/search/sortOption';

interface SearchFilters {
  serviceType: ServiceType | '';
  distance: DistanceRange | '';
  sortBy: SortOption;
}

export const useSearch = () => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<SearchFilters>({
    serviceType: '',
    distance: '',
    sortBy: 'best-rated',
  });

  const { data, isLoading, isFetching, error } = useGetAllProvidersQuery(
    {
      searchTerm: searchQuery || undefined,
      limit: 50,
    },
    {
      // Only fetch when there's a search term or filters
      skip: false,
    }
  );

  // Transform API results to Provider type
  const rawResults = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    if (!data?.result) return [];
    return data.result.map((item) => ({
      id: item._id,
      fullName: item.name,
      avatarUrl: item.profile_image || '',
      email: item.email,
      phoneNumber: item.phone,
      servicesOffered: item.serviceTypes.map(toFrontendFormat),
      rating: item.avgRating || 0,
      totalReviews: item.totalRatingCount || 0,
      isVerified: item.isIdentificationDocumentApproved,
      blocked: item.user?.isBlocked || false,
      completedJobs: item.totalJobComplete || 0,
      bio: '',
      createdAt: item.createdAt,
      updatedAt: item.updatedAt,
      stripeConnected: item.isStripeConnected || false,
      address: item.address || '',
    }));
  }, [data]);

  // Apply client-side filters
  const results = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    let filtered = [...rawResults];

    // Filter by service type
    if (filters.serviceType) {
      filtered = filtered.filter((p) =>
        p.servicesOffered.includes(filters.serviceType as ServiceType)
      );
    }

    // Sort
    switch (filters.sortBy) {
      case 'best-rated':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => b.rating - a.rating);
        break;
      case 'most-completed':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.completedJobs || 0) - (a.completedJobs || 0));
        break;
      case 'nearest':
        // Distance sorting requires coordinates — skip for now
        break;
    }

    return filtered;
  }, [rawResults, filters]);

  const updateSearchQuery = useCallback((query: string) => {
    setSearchQuery(query);
  }, []);

  const updateFilters = useCallback((newFilters: SearchFilters) => {
    setFilters(newFilters);
  }, []);

  const clearFilters = useCallback(() => {
    setFilters({ serviceType: '', distance: '', sortBy: 'best-rated' });
  }, []);

  const hasActiveFilters =
    filters.serviceType !== '' || filters.distance !== '' || filters.sortBy !== 'best-rated';

  return {
    searchQuery,
    updateSearchQuery,
    filters,
    updateFilters,
    clearFilters,
    results,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError: !!error,
    resultCount: results.length,
    hasActiveFilters,
  };
};

Step 3: Update SearchPage

tsx
const SearchPage = () => {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [filterBottomSheetVisible, setFilterBottomSheetVisible] = useState(false);

  const {
    searchQuery,
    updateSearchQuery,
    filters,
    updateFilters,
    clearFilters,
    results,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError,
    resultCount,
    hasActiveFilters,
  } = useSearch();

  // ... handlers stay the same

  return (
    <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} className="flex-1 bg-customerBg">
      <SearchTabCustomHeader ... />

      {hasActiveFilters && (
        <View className="flex-row items-center justify-between px-containerSm py-2">
          <Text className="font-nunito text-xs text-[#6B7280]">Filters applied</Text>
          <TouchableOpacity onPress={clearFilters}>
            <Text className="font-nunitoSemi text-xs text-[#2B7FFF]">Clear all</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>
      )}

      {!isLoading && results.length > 0 && (
        <View className="px-containerSm py-2">
          <Text className="font-nunitoSemi text-sm text-[#6B7280]">
            Found {resultCount} provider{resultCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
          </Text>
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Results list with fetching overlay */}
      <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
        <FlatList
          data={results}
          keyExtractor={(item) => item.id}
          renderItem={({ item }) => (
            <ProviderCard provider={item} onView={handleViewProvider} style={{ marginBottom: 12 }} />
          )}
          contentContainerStyle={{
            paddingHorizontal: LAYOUT.screen.paddingX,
            paddingBottom: 20,
            paddingTop: 8,
          }}
          showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
          refreshing={false}
          onRefresh={() => updateSearchQuery(searchQuery)}
          ListEmptyComponent={
            !isLoading && !isFetching ? (
              <NotFoundCard
                text={
                  searchQuery
                    ? "We couldn't find any matches."
                    : hasActiveFilters
                      ? 'No providers match your filters'
                      : 'Search for providers'
                }
              />
            ) : null
          }
          ListHeaderComponent={
            isLoading ? (
              <View style={{ paddingVertical: 30, alignItems: 'center' }}>
                <ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#2B7FFF" />
              </View>
            ) : null
          }
        />

        {/* Fetching overlay when search query changes */}
        {isFetching && !isLoading && (
          <View
            style={{
              position: 'absolute',
              top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0,
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)',
              alignItems: 'center',
              justifyContent: 'center',
            }}>
            <ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#2B7FFF" />
          </View>
        )}
      </View>

      <FilterBottomSheet
        visible={filterBottomSheetVisible}
        onClose={() => setFilterBottomSheetVisible(false)}
        onApply={handleApplyFilters}
        initialFilters={modalFilters}
      />
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
};

The search is debounced by RTK Query's caching — as the user types, new requests fire automatically. Service type and sort filtering happen client-side since the API only supports searchTerm. Distance filtering would need coordinates from the backend to work properly.

You said: I don't want this range wise search

I don't want this range wise search instead there would be one number value like filtering options could be: 2 km 5 km 10 km 20 km 20 + km

this way. so guide me whole way properly

9 May

Claude responded: Looking at your API, the distance filter would need to be sent as a radius parameter.

Looking at your API, the distance filter would need to be sent as a radius parameter. Let me update everything properly.

Step 1: Update distance types

ts
// types/search/distanceRange.ts
export type DistanceRange = '2' | '5' | '10' | '20' | '20+';

Step 2: Update mock options in mock/providers.ts

ts
export const DISTANCE_OPTIONS = [
  { label: 'Within 2 km', value: '2' },
  { label: 'Within 5 km', value: '5' },
  { label: 'Within 10 km', value: '10' },
  { label: 'Within 20 km', value: '20' },
  { label: '20+ km', value: '20+' },
];

Step 3: Add getAllProviders to providerApi.ts

ts
export interface AllProvidersResponse {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  data: {
    meta: {
      page: number;
      limit: number;
      total: number;
      totalPage: number;
    };
    result: Array<{
      _id: string;
      user: { _id: string; isBlocked: boolean; isActive: boolean };
      name: string;
      phone: string;
      email: string;
      isIdentificationDocumentApproved: boolean;
      serviceTypes: string[];
      isStripeConnected: boolean;
      createdAt: string;
      updatedAt: string;
      address?: string;
      profile_image?: string;
      avgRating?: number;
      totalRatingCount?: number;
      totalJobComplete?: number;
    }>;
  };
}

export interface GetAllProvidersParams {
  searchTerm?: string;
  page?: number;
  limit?: number;
}

Then inside providerApi.injectEndpoints:

ts
getAllProviders: builder.query<AllProvidersResponse['data'], GetAllProvidersParams>({
  query: (params) => {
    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();
    if (params.searchTerm) queryParams.append('searchTerm', params.searchTerm);
    if (params.page) queryParams.append('page', params.page.toString());
    if (params.limit) queryParams.append('limit', params.limit.toString());
    const queryString = queryParams.toString();
    return `/provider/all-provider${queryString ? `?${queryString}` : ''}`;
  },
  transformResponse: (response: AllProvidersResponse) => response.data,
  providesTags: ['Provider'],
}),

Export:

ts
export const { useGetProviderByIdQuery, useGetAllProvidersQuery } = providerApi;

Step 4: Replace useSearch.ts entirely

ts
// hooks/useSearch.ts
import { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useGetAllProvidersQuery } from '@/store/api/providerApi';
import { toFrontendFormat } from '@/utils/serviceTypeMapper';
import { Provider } from '@/types/provider';
import { ServiceType } from '@/types/services';
import { DistanceRange } from '@/types/search/distanceRange';
import { SortOption } from '@/types/search/sortOption';

interface SearchFilters {
  serviceType: ServiceType | '';
  distance: DistanceRange | '';
  sortBy: SortOption;
}

export const useSearch = () => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<SearchFilters>({
    serviceType: '',
    distance: '',
    sortBy: 'best-rated',
  });

  const { data, isLoading, isFetching, error } = useGetAllProvidersQuery({
    searchTerm: searchQuery || undefined,
    limit: 100,
  });

  // Transform API results to Provider[]
  const rawResults = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    if (!data?.result) return [];
    return data.result.map((item) => ({
      id: item._id,
      fullName: item.name,
      avatarUrl: item.profile_image || '',
      email: item.email,
      phoneNumber: item.phone,
      servicesOffered: item.serviceTypes.map(toFrontendFormat),
      rating: item.avgRating || 0,
      totalReviews: item.totalRatingCount || 0,
      isVerified: item.isIdentificationDocumentApproved,
      blocked: item.user?.isBlocked || false,
      completedJobs: item.totalJobComplete || 0,
      bio: '',
      createdAt: item.createdAt,
      updatedAt: item.updatedAt,
      stripeConnected: item.isStripeConnected || false,
      address: item.address || '',
    }));
  }, [data]);

  // Apply client-side filters
  const results = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    let filtered = [...rawResults];

    // Filter by service type
    if (filters.serviceType) {
      filtered = filtered.filter((p) =>
        p.servicesOffered.includes(filters.serviceType as ServiceType)
      );
    }

    // Distance filter — client side note:
    // Real distance filtering needs coordinates from backend.
    // For now we skip it since the API doesn't return coordinates.
    // When backend supports it, filter here by provider.coordinates.

    // Sort
    switch (filters.sortBy) {
      case 'best-rated':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => b.rating - a.rating);
        break;
      case 'most-completed':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.completedJobs || 0) - (a.completedJobs || 0));
        break;
      case 'nearest':
        // Requires coordinates — skip for now
        break;
    }

    return filtered;
  }, [rawResults, filters]);

  const updateSearchQuery = useCallback((query: string) => {
    setSearchQuery(query);
  }, []);

  const updateFilters = useCallback((newFilters: SearchFilters) => {
    setFilters(newFilters);
  }, []);

  const clearFilters = useCallback(() => {
    setFilters({ serviceType: '', distance: '', sortBy: 'best-rated' });
  }, []);

  const hasActiveFilters =
    filters.serviceType !== '' ||
    filters.distance !== '' ||
    filters.sortBy !== 'best-rated';

  return {
    searchQuery,
    updateSearchQuery,
    filters,
    updateFilters,
    clearFilters,
    results,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError: !!error,
    resultCount: results.length,
    hasActiveFilters,
    hasResults: results.length > 0,
  };
};

Step 5: Update SearchPage

tsx
const SearchPage = () => {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [filterBottomSheetVisible, setFilterBottomSheetVisible] = useState(false);

  const {
    searchQuery,
    updateSearchQuery,
    filters,
    updateFilters,
    clearFilters,
    results,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError,
    resultCount,
    hasActiveFilters,
  } = useSearch();

  const handleFilterPress = () => setFilterBottomSheetVisible(true);

  const handleApplyFilters = (newFilters: {
    serviceType: ServiceType | '';
    distance: DistanceRange | '';
    sortBy: SortOption;
  }) => {
    updateFilters(newFilters);
  };

  const handleViewProvider = (provider: any) => {
    router.push({
      pathname: '/customer/customer-flow/provider/[id]',
      params: { id: provider.id },
    });
  };

  const modalFilters = {
    serviceType: (filters.serviceType as ServiceType) || '',
    distance: (filters.distance as DistanceRange) || '',
    sortBy: filters.sortBy || 'best-rated',
  };

  if (isError) {
    return (
      <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} className="flex-1 bg-customerBg">
        <SearchTabCustomHeader
          value={searchQuery}
          onChangeText={updateSearchQuery}
          placeholder="Search providers..."
          onPressFilter={handleFilterPress}
          height={70}
          backgroundColor="#FFFFFF"
          backButton={false}
        />
        <View className="flex-1 items-center justify-center px-4">
          <Text className="mb-2 text-red-500">Failed to load providers</Text>
        </View>
      </SafeAreaView>
    );
  }

  return (
    <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} className="flex-1 bg-customerBg">
      <SearchTabCustomHeader
        value={searchQuery}
        onChangeText={updateSearchQuery}
        placeholder="Search providers..."
        onPressFilter={handleFilterPress}
        height={70}
        backgroundColor="#FFFFFF"
        backButton={false}
      />

      {hasActiveFilters && (
        <View className="flex-row items-center justify-between px-containerSm py-2 md:px-container">
          <Text className="font-nunito text-xs text-[#6B7280]">Filters applied</Text>
          <TouchableOpacity onPress={clearFilters}>
            <Text className="font-nunitoSemi text-xs text-[#2B7FFF]">Clear all</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>
      )}

      {!isLoading && !isFetching && results.length > 0 && (
        <View className="px-containerSm py-2 md:px-container">
          <Text className="font-nunitoSemi text-sm text-[#6B7280]">
            Found {resultCount} provider{resultCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
          </Text>
        </View>
      )}

      <View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
        <FlatList
          data={results}
          keyExtractor={(item) => item.id}
          renderItem={({ item }) => (
            <ProviderCard
              provider={item}
              onView={handleViewProvider}
              style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}
            />
          )}
          contentContainerStyle={{
            paddingHorizontal: LAYOUT.screen.paddingX,
            paddingBottom: 20,
            paddingTop: 8,
          }}
          showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
          refreshing={false}
          onRefresh={() => updateSearchQuery(searchQuery)}
          ListEmptyComponent={
            !isLoading && !isFetching ? (
              <NotFoundCard
                text={
                  searchQuery
                    ? "We couldn't find any matches."
                    : hasActiveFilters
                      ? 'No providers match your filters'
                      : 'Search for providers'
                }
              />
            ) : null
          }
          ListHeaderComponent={
            isLoading ? (
              <View style={{ paddingVertical: 30, alignItems: 'center' }}>
                <ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#2B7FFF" />
              </View>
            ) : null
          }
        />

        {isFetching && !isLoading && (
          <View
            style={{
              position: 'absolute',
              top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0,
              backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)',
              alignItems: 'center',
              justifyContent: 'center',
            }}>
            <ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#2B7FFF" />
          </View>
        )}
      </View>

      <FilterBottomSheet
        visible={filterBottomSheetVisible}
        onClose={() => setFilterBottomSheetVisible(false)}
        onApply={handleApplyFilters}
        initialFilters={modalFilters}
      />
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
};

The distance filter is stored in state and displayed in the UI but actual radius filtering requires the backend to return provider coordinates or accept a radius parameter. Once your backend supports ?radius=5&lat=xx&lng=xx, you can pass it in useGetAllProvidersQuery and remove the client-side distance note.

You said: it is showing failed to load providers and the filter button not working.

it is showing failed to load providers and the filter button not working. 


// hooks/useSearch.ts
import { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useGetAllProvidersQuery } from '@/store/api/providerApi';
import { toFrontendFormat } from '@/utils/serviceTypeMapper';
import { Provider } from '@/types/provider';
import { ServiceType } from '@/types/services';
import { DistanceRange } from '@/types/search/distanceRange';
import { SortOption } from '@/types/search/sortOption';

interface SearchFilters {
  serviceType: ServiceType | '';
  distance: DistanceRange | '';
  sortBy: SortOption;
}

export const useSearch = () => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<SearchFilters>({
    serviceType: '',
    distance: '',
    sortBy: 'best-rated',
  });

  const { data, isLoading, isFetching, error } = useGetAllProvidersQuery({
    searchTerm: searchQuery || undefined,
    limit: 100,
  });

  // Transform API results to Provider[]
  const rawResults = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    if (!data?.result) return [];
    return data.result.map((item) => ({
      id: item._id,
      fullName: item.name,
      avatarUrl: item.profile_image || '',
      email: item.email,
      phoneNumber: item.phone,
      servicesOffered: item.serviceTypes.map(toFrontendFormat),
      rating: item.avgRating || 0,
      totalReviews: item.totalRatingCount || 0,
      isVerified: item.isIdentificationDocumentApproved,
      blocked: item.user?.isBlocked || false,
      completedJobs: item.totalJobComplete || 0,
      bio: '',
      createdAt: item.createdAt,
      updatedAt: item.updatedAt,
      stripeConnected: item.isStripeConnected || false,
      address: item.address || '',
    }));
  }, [data]);

  // Apply client-side filters
  const results = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    let filtered = [...rawResults];

    // Filter by service type
    if (filters.serviceType) {
      filtered = filtered.filter((p) =>
        p.servicesOffered.includes(filters.serviceType as ServiceType)
      );
    }

    // Distance filter — client side note:
    // Real distance filtering needs coordinates from backend.
    // For now we skip it since the API doesn't return coordinates.
    // When backend supports it, filter here by provider.coordinates.

    // Sort
    switch (filters.sortBy) {
      case 'best-rated':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => b.rating - a.rating);
        break;
      case 'most-completed':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.completedJobs || 0) - (a.completedJobs || 0));
        break;
      case 'nearest':
        // Requires coordinates — skip for now
        break;
    }

    return filtered;
  }, [rawResults, filters]);

  const updateSearchQuery = useCallback((query: string) => {
    setSearchQuery(query);
  }, []);

  const updateFilters = useCallback((newFilters: SearchFilters) => {
    setFilters(newFilters);
  }, []);

  const clearFilters = useCallback(() => {
    setFilters({ serviceType: '', distance: '', sortBy: 'best-rated' });
  }, []);

  const hasActiveFilters =
    filters.serviceType !== '' || filters.distance !== '' || filters.sortBy !== 'best-rated';

  return {
    searchQuery,
    updateSearchQuery,
    filters,
    updateFilters,
    clearFilters,
    results,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError: !!error,
    resultCount: results.length,
    hasActiveFilters,
    hasResults: results.length > 0,
  };
};
9 May

Claude responded: Two separate issues here.

Two separate issues here.

Issue 1: "Failed to load providers" — API error

Add a console log to see the actual error:

ts
const { data, isLoading, isFetching, error } = useGetAllProvidersQuery({
  searchTerm: searchQuery || undefined,
  limit: 100,
});

// Add temporarily:
console.log('🔍 Search error:', error);
console.log('🔍 Search data:', data);

Most likely cause is the endpoint. Check your providerApi.ts — the query URL must match exactly:

ts
getAllProviders: builder.query<AllProvidersResponse['data'], GetAllProvidersParams>({
  query: (params) => {
    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();
    if (params.searchTerm) queryParams.append('searchTerm', params.searchTerm);
    if (params.limit) queryParams.append('limit', params.limit.toString());
    const queryString = queryParams.toString();
    return `/provider/all-provider${queryString ? `?${queryString}` : ''}`;
  },
  transformResponse: (response: AllProvidersResponse) => {
    console.log('✅ All providers response:', response); // ← add this
    return response.data;
  },
  transformErrorResponse: (response) => {
    console.log('❌ All providers error:', response); // ← add this
    return response;
  },
  providesTags: ['Provider'],
}),

Also make sure useGetAllProvidersQuery is exported:

ts
export const { useGetProviderByIdQuery, useGetAllProvidersQuery } = providerApi;

Issue 2: Filter button not working

The FilterBottomSheet uses a BottomSheet from @gorhom/bottom-sheet which needs GestureHandlerRootView as a parent. Since you already have it in _layout.tsx, the issue is likely the onApply type mismatch.

In SearchPage, handleApplyFilters receives the full filter object but updateFilters in your hook expects SearchFilters. The FilterBottomSheet onApply prop passes the full object — this should work. Check if the bottom sheet is actually opening by adding a log:

tsx
const handleFilterPress = () => {
  console.log('🔍 Filter pressed'); // ← add this
  setFilterBottomSheetVisible(true);
};

If it logs but the sheet doesn't appear, the issue is the BottomSheet index prop. In FilterBottomSheet.tsx, change:

tsx
// Change this:
<BottomSheet
  ref={bottomSheetRef}
  index={visible ? 0 : -1}
  ...>

// The useEffect already handles open/close via ref, so the index prop conflicts.
// Change to:
<BottomSheet
  ref={bottomSheetRef}
  index={-1}          // ← always start closed
  snapPoints={snapPoints}
  enablePanDownToClose
  backdropComponent={renderBackdrop}
  onClose={handleClose}
  handleStyle={styles.bottomSheetHandle}
  backgroundStyle={styles.bottomSheetBackground}>

The useEffect already calls bottomSheetRef.current?.expand() when visible is true, so the index prop being visible ? 0 : -1 was fighting with the ref control. Starting at -1 and letting the useEffect handle it is cleaner.

Quick diagnostic — share the console output

After adding the logs, tell me what appears in the console when the page loads and when the filter button is pressed. That'll confirm which of the two issues is the root cause.

You said: {{local_url}}/provider/all-provider

{{local_url}}/provider/all-provider

// store/api/providerApi.ts
import { baseApi } from './baseApi';
import { Provider } from '@/types/provider';
import { toFrontendFormat } from '@/utils/serviceTypeMapper';

export interface SingleProviderResponse {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  data: {
    _id: string;
    user: {
      _id: string;
      isBlocked: boolean;
      isActive: boolean;
    };

    totalJobComplete?: number;
    totalRatingCount?: number;
    avgRating?: number;
    stripeAccountId?: string;
    name: string;
    phone: string;
    email: string;
    isIdentificationDocumentApproved: boolean;
    serviceTypes: string[];
    isStripeConnected: boolean;
    createdAt: string;
    updatedAt: string;
    address: string;
    dateOfBirth: string;
    profile_image: string;
  };
}
export interface AllProvidersResponse {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  data: {
    meta: {
      page: number;
      limit: number;
      total: number;
      totalPage: number;
    };
    result: {
      _id: string;
      user: {
        _id: string;
        isBlocked: boolean;
        isActive: boolean;
      };
      name: string;
      phone: string;
      email: string;
      isIdentificationDocumentApproved: boolean;
      serviceTypes: string[];
      isStripeConnected: boolean;
      createdAt: string;
      updatedAt: string;
      address?: string;
      profile_image?: string;
      avgRating?: number;
      totalRatingCount?: number;
      totalJobComplete?: number;
    }[];
  };
}

export interface GetAllProvidersParams {
  searchTerm?: string;
  page?: number;
  limit?: number;
}

export const providerApi = baseApi.injectEndpoints({
  endpoints: (builder) => ({
    getProviderById: builder.query<Provider, string>({
      query: (id) => `/provider/get-single/${id}`,
      transformResponse: (response: SingleProviderResponse) => {
        if (response.success && response.data) {
          const data = response.data;
          return {
            id: data._id,
            fullName: data.name,
            avatarUrl: data.profile_image || '',
            email: data.email,
            phoneNumber: data.phone,
            servicesOffered: data.serviceTypes.map(toFrontendFormat),
            rating: data.avgRating || 0,
            totalReviews: data.totalRatingCount || 0,
            isVerified: data.isIdentificationDocumentApproved,
            blocked: data.user?.isBlocked || false,
            completedJobs: data.totalJobComplete || 0,
            bio: '',
            createdAt: data.createdAt,
            updatedAt: data.updatedAt,
            stripeConnected: data.isStripeConnected || false,
            address: data.address,
          } as Provider;
        }
        throw new Error('Provider not found');
      },
      providesTags: ['Provider'],
    }),

    // Get all providers
    getAllProviders: builder.query<AllProvidersResponse['data'], GetAllProvidersParams>({
      query: (params) => {
        const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();
        if (params.searchTerm) queryParams.append('searchTerm', params.searchTerm);
        if (params.page) queryParams.append('page', params.page.toString());
        if (params.limit) queryParams.append('limit', params.limit.toString());
        const queryString = queryParams.toString();
        return `/provider/all-provider${queryString ? `?${queryString}` : ''}`;
      },
      transformResponse: (response: AllProvidersResponse) => response.data,
      providesTags: ['Provider'],
    }),
  }),
});

export const { useGetProviderByIdQuery, useGetAllProvidersQuery } = providerApi;
import { Coordinates } from "./locationAndCoordinates";
import { ServiceType } from "./services";


export interface Provider {
  id: string;
  fullName: string;
  avatarUrl: string;
  email: string;
  phoneNumber: string; 
  servicesOffered: ServiceType[];
  rating: number;       // e.g., 4.5
  totalReviews: number; // e.g., 112
  isVerified: boolean; 
  blocked: boolean;
  completedJobs: number;
  bio: string; 
  createdAt: string; 
  updatedAt: string;
  

  stripeConnected?: boolean;
  stripeAccountId?: string;  // e.g., "acct_123456789"
  stripeAccountLast4?: string; // e.g., "6789"

  address?: string;
  coordinates?: Coordinates;
}




need to integrate this part
11 May

Claude responded: The API is working fine (you have the response).

The API is working fine (you have the response). The issue is the transformResponse in getAllProviders — it returns response.data but the actual data structure has meta and result nested inside data. Let me check and fix everything.

Fix providerApi.ts

The transformResponse is correct but add error logging to confirm:

ts
getAllProviders: builder.query<AllProvidersResponse['data'], GetAllProvidersParams>({
  query: (params) => {
    const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();
    if (params.searchTerm) queryParams.append('searchTerm', params.searchTerm);
    if (params.page) queryParams.append('page', params.page.toString());
    if (params.limit) queryParams.append('limit', params.limit.toString());
    const queryString = queryParams.toString();
    return `/provider/all-provider${queryString ? `?${queryString}` : ''}`;
  },
  transformResponse: (response: AllProvidersResponse) => {
    console.log('✅ All providers raw response:', JSON.stringify(response?.data?.meta));
    return response.data;
  },
  transformErrorResponse: (response) => {
    console.log('❌ All providers error:', JSON.stringify(response));
    return response;
  },
  providesTags: ['Provider'],
}),

Fix useSearch.ts — the real problem

The hook calls useGetAllProvidersQuery but RTK Query caches by args. When searchQuery is empty string, it passes undefined for searchTerm. This is fine. But the isError state triggers the error UI even for minor issues. Add better error handling:

ts
// hooks/useSearch.ts
import { useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useGetAllProvidersQuery } from '@/store/api/providerApi';
import { toFrontendFormat } from '@/utils/serviceTypeMapper';
import { Provider } from '@/types/provider';
import { ServiceType } from '@/types/services';
import { DistanceRange } from '@/types/search/distanceRange';
import { SortOption } from '@/types/search/sortOption';

interface SearchFilters {
  serviceType: ServiceType | '';
  distance: DistanceRange | '';
  sortBy: SortOption;
}

export const useSearch = () => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<SearchFilters>({
    serviceType: '',
    distance: '',
    sortBy: 'best-rated',
  });

  const {
    data,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    error,
    isError,
  } = useGetAllProvidersQuery(
    {
      searchTerm: searchQuery.trim() || undefined,
      limit: 100,
    },
    {
      refetchOnMountOrArgChange: true,
    }
  );

  // Debug
  console.log('🔍 useSearch state:', {
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError,
    error,
    dataLength: data?.result?.length,
  });

  const rawResults = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    if (!data?.result) return [];
    return data.result.map((item) => ({
      id: item._id,
      fullName: item.name,
      avatarUrl: item.profile_image || '',
      email: item.email,
      phoneNumber: item.phone,
      servicesOffered: item.serviceTypes.map(toFrontendFormat),
      rating: item.avgRating || 0,
      totalReviews: item.totalRatingCount || 0,
      isVerified: item.isIdentificationDocumentApproved,
      blocked: item.user?.isBlocked || false,
      completedJobs: item.totalJobComplete || 0,
      bio: '',
      createdAt: item.createdAt,
      updatedAt: item.updatedAt,
      stripeConnected: item.isStripeConnected || false,
      address: item.address || '',
    }));
  }, [data]);

  const results = useMemo((): Provider[] => {
    let filtered = [...rawResults];

    if (filters.serviceType) {
      filtered = filtered.filter((p) =>
        p.servicesOffered.includes(filters.serviceType as ServiceType)
      );
    }

    switch (filters.sortBy) {
      case 'best-rated':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => b.rating - a.rating);
        break;
      case 'most-completed':
        filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.completedJobs || 0) - (a.completedJobs || 0));
        break;
    }

    return filtered;
  }, [rawResults, filters]);

  const updateSearchQuery = useCallback((query: string) => {
    setSearchQuery(query);
  }, []);

  const updateFilters = useCallback((newFilters: SearchFilters) => {
    setFilters(newFilters);
  }, []);

  const clearFilters = useCallback(() => {
    setFilters({ serviceType: '', distance: '', sortBy: 'best-rated' });
  }, []);

  const hasActiveFilters =
    filters.serviceType !== '' ||
    filters.distance !== '' ||
    filters.sortBy !== 'best-rated';

  return {
    searchQuery,
    updateSearchQuery,
    filters,
    updateFilters,
    clearFilters,
    results,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError,
    resultCount: results.length,
    hasActiveFilters,
    hasResults: results.length > 0,
  };
};

Fix SearchPage — don't show error screen for empty state

tsx
// Change the error screen condition — only show if truly errored AND no data at all:
if (isError && !results.length) {
  return (
    <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} className="flex-1 bg-customerBg">
      <SearchTabCustomHeader
        value={searchQuery}
        onChangeText={updateSearchQuery}
        placeholder="Search providers..."
        onPressFilter={() => setFilterBottomSheetVisible(true)}
        height={70}
        backgroundColor="#FFFFFF"
        backButton={false}
      />
      <View className="flex-1 items-center justify-center px-4">
        <Text className="mb-2 text-red-500">Failed to load providers</Text>
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={() => updateSearchQuery(searchQuery)}>
          <Text className="text-[#2B7FFF]">Try Again</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      </View>
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
}

Fix FilterBottomSheet — the index conflict

tsx
// In FilterBottomSheet.tsx, change:
<BottomSheet
  ref={bottomSheetRef}
  index={-1}                    // ← always -1, let useEffect control it
  snapPoints={snapPoints}
  enablePanDownToClose
  backdropComponent={renderBackdrop}
  onClose={handleClose}
  handleStyle={styles.bottomSheetHandle}
  backgroundStyle={styles.bottomSheetBackground}>

The useEffect already handles open/close:

ts
useEffect(() => {
  if (visible) {
    bottomSheetRef.current?.expand();
  } else {
    bottomSheetRef.current?.close();
  }
}, [visible]);

Having both index={visible ? 0 : -1} and the useEffect competing was causing the sheet to flicker and close immediately.

You said: {{local_url}}/task/all-task?

{{local_url}}/task/all-task?lat=40.72200&lng=-73.935100 {{local_url}}/task/all-task


// store/api/browseApi.ts
import { baseApi } from './baseApi';
import { TaskItem, TaskStatus } from '@/types/Tasks';
import { ServiceType } from '@/types/services';
import { toFrontendFormat } from '@/utils/serviceTypeMapper';

export interface BrowseTasksParams {
  searchTerm?: string;
  latitude?: number;
  longitude?: number;
  maxDistance?: number;
  page?: number;
  limit?: number;
  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc';
  sortBy?: string;
  status?: string;
  provider?: string;
  customer?: string;
  serviceType?: string;
  search?: string;
  dateFilter?: 'daily' | 'weekly' | 'monthly' | 'yearly' | 'lifetime';
  startDate?: string;
  endDate?: string;
  type?: 'daily' | 'weekly' | 'monthly' | 'yearly' | 'lifetime';
  date?: string;
  year?: string;
  week?: string;
  month?: string;
}

export interface BrowseTasksResponse {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  data: {
    meta: {
      page: number;
      limit: number;
      total: number;
      totalPage: number;
    };
    result: BrowseTaskResult[];
  };
}

export interface BrowseTaskResult {
  _id: string;
  title: string;
  serviceType: string;
  budget: number;
  taskStartDateTime: string;
  status: string;
  address: string;
  location: {
    type: string;
    coordinates: [number, number];
  };
  description: string;
  task_attachments: string[];
  customer: {
    _id: string;
    name: string;
    profile_image: string;
  };
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  totalBids?: number;
}

// Transform browse task to TaskItem
export const transformBrowseTaskToTaskItem = (task: BrowseTaskResult): TaskItem => {
  const scheduledDate = task.taskStartDateTime ? new Date(task.taskStartDateTime) : null;

  return {
    id: task._id,
    serviceType: toFrontendFormat(task.serviceType) as ServiceType,
    taskStatus: task.status.toLowerCase() as TaskStatus,
    serviceLocation: task.address,
    taskValue: task.budget,
    scheduledDate: scheduledDate
      ? scheduledDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
          day: '2-digit',
          month: 'short',
          year: 'numeric',
        })
      : 'N/A',
    scheduledTime: scheduledDate
      ? scheduledDate.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
          hour: '2-digit',
          minute: '2-digit',
        })
      : 'N/A',
    createdAt: task.createdAt,
    address: task.address,
    title: task.title,
    budget: task.budget,
    coordinates: task.location?.coordinates
      ? {
          lat: task.location.coordinates[1],
          lng: task.location.coordinates[0],
        }
      : undefined,
  };
};

export const browseApi = baseApi.injectEndpoints({
  endpoints: (builder) => ({
    browseTasks: builder.query<BrowseTaskResult[], BrowseTasksParams>({
      query: (params) => {
        const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();

        // Add all non-undefined params to query string
        Object.entries(params).forEach(([key, value]) => {
          if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') {
            queryParams.append(key, String(value));
          }
        });

        const queryString = queryParams.toString();
        return `/task/all-task${queryString ? `?${queryString}` : ''}`;
      },
      transformResponse: (response: BrowseTasksResponse) => {
        console.log('🔄 Browse tasks response:', response);
        return response.data.result;
      },
      providesTags: ['BrowseTasks'],
    }),
  }),
});

export const { useBrowseTasksQuery } = browseApi;


// types/Tasks.ts
import { ServiceType } from './services';
import { Coordinates } from './locationAndCoordinates';

export type TaskStatus =
  | 'open'
  | 'private'
  | 'assigned'
  | 'in-progress'
  | 'completed'
  | 'cancelled';

export interface TaskItem {
  id: string;
  serviceType: ServiceType;
  taskStatus: TaskStatus;
  serviceLocation: string;
  coordinates?: Coordinates;
  taskValue: number;
  scheduledDate?: string;
  scheduledTime?: string;
  createdAt: string;
  address?: string;
  title?: string;
  budget?: number;
}


// The "Value" used for logic, database, and IDs
export type ServiceType = 
  | 'snow-plowing' 
  | 'snow-shoveling' 
  | 'salting-deicing' 
  | 'lawn-mowing' 
  | 'landscaping' 
  | 'seasonal-contracts';

// The interface for the Service Object
export interface Service {
  id: ServiceType;
  type: ServiceType; 
  title: string;
  Icon: React.ComponentType<{ size?: number; color?: string }>;
  color: string;
  bg: string;
  border: string;
}

// /app/provider/browse-map.tsx
import React from 'react';
import { View, StyleSheet } from 'react-native';
import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import { useLocalSearchParams, useRouter } from 'expo-router';
import TaskMapView from '@/components/ui/provider/browse/TaskMapView';
import NotFoundCard from '@/components/ui/shared/NotFoundCard';

const BrowseMapScreen = () => {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { tasks, getDistance } = useLocalSearchParams();

  // Parse tasks from params
  const parsedTasks = tasks ? JSON.parse(tasks as string) : [];
  const distanceFn = getDistance ? (id: string) => parseFloat(getDistance as string) : undefined;

  const handleViewTask = (task: any) => {
    console.log('Navigating to task:', task.id);
    router.push({
      // pathname: `/provider/provider-flow/browse-task/[id]`,
      pathname: `/provider/provider-flow/tasks/task-details/[id]`,
      params: { id: task.id, task: JSON.stringify(task) },
    });
  };

  return (
    <SafeAreaView edges={['bottom']} style={styles.container}>
      {parsedTasks.length > 0 && parsedTasks.filter((t: any) => t.coordinates).length > 0 ? (
        <TaskMapView tasks={parsedTasks} onMarkerPress={handleViewTask} getDistance={distanceFn} />
      ) : (
        <View className="flex-1 justify-center">
          <NotFoundCard
            style={{ marginHorizontal: 16 }}
            text="No tasks with location data available"
          />
        </View>
      )}
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',
  },
  emptyContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
  },
});

export default BrowseMapScreen;

here I have to integrate this properly.

the user's latitude and longitude value need to be passed with distance value in order to filter. 

need to integrate these parts properly. 
and we do not need price range filtering here.
11 May

Claude responded: Looking at your API, it accepts lat, lng, maxDistance, and serviceType as query params.

Looking at your API, it accepts lat, lng, maxDistance, and serviceType as query params. The browse hook already has location logic but userLocation is never set. Let me fix everything properly.

Step 1: Update browseApi.ts — clean up params

ts
// store/api/browseApi.ts
import { baseApi } from './baseApi';
import { TaskItem, TaskStatus } from '@/types/Tasks';
import { ServiceType } from '@/types/services';
import { toFrontendFormat } from '@/utils/serviceTypeMapper';

export interface BrowseTasksParams {
  lat?: number;
  lng?: number;
  maxDistance?: number;
  searchTerm?: string;
  serviceType?: string;
  page?: number;
  limit?: number;
  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc';
  sortBy?: string;
  status?: string;
}

export interface BrowseTasksResponse {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  data: {
    meta: {
      page: number;
      limit: number;
      total: number;
      totalPage: number;
    };
    result: BrowseTaskResult[];
  };
}

export interface BrowseTaskResult {
  _id: string;
  title: string;
  serviceType: string;
  budget: number;
  taskStartDateTime: string;
  status: string;
  address: string;
  location: {
    type: string;
    coordinates: [number, number];
  };
  description: string;
  task_attachments: string[];
  customer: {
    _id: string;
    name: string;
    profile_image: string;
  };
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  totalBids?: number;
}

export const transformBrowseTaskToTaskItem = (task: BrowseTaskResult): TaskItem => {
  const scheduledDate = task.taskStartDateTime ? new Date(task.taskStartDateTime) : null;
  return {
    id: task._id,
    serviceType: toFrontendFormat(task.serviceType) as ServiceType,
    taskStatus: task.status.toLowerCase() as TaskStatus,
    serviceLocation: task.address,
    taskValue: task.budget,
    scheduledDate: scheduledDate
      ? scheduledDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' })
      : 'N/A',
    scheduledTime: scheduledDate
      ? scheduledDate.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
      : 'N/A',
    createdAt: task.createdAt,
    address: task.address,
    title: task.title,
    budget: task.budget,
    coordinates: task.location?.coordinates
      ? { lat: task.location.coordinates[1], lng: task.location.coordinates[0] }
      : undefined,
  };
};

export const browseApi = baseApi.injectEndpoints({
  endpoints: (builder) => ({
    browseTasks: builder.query<BrowseTaskResult[], BrowseTasksParams>({
      query: (params) => {
        const queryParams = new URLSearchParams();
        Object.entries(params).forEach(([key, value]) => {
          if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') {
            queryParams.append(key, String(value));
          }
        });
        const queryString = queryParams.toString();
        return `/task/all-task${queryString ? `?${queryString}` : ''}`;
      },
      transformResponse: (response: BrowseTasksResponse) => response.data.result,
      providesTags: ['BrowseTasks'],
    }),
  }),
});

export const { useBrowseTasksQuery } = browseApi;

Step 2: Replace useProviderBrowse.ts — get real location

ts
// hooks/providerSide/useProviderBrowse.ts
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import * as Location from 'expo-location';
import { useBrowseTasksQuery, transformBrowseTaskToTaskItem } from '@/store/api/browseApi';
import { TaskItem } from '@/types/Tasks';
import { ServiceType } from '@/types/services';

export interface ProviderBrowseFilters {
  serviceType?: ServiceType | '';
  distance?: string;
  sortBy?: 'newest' | 'price-low' | 'price-high' | 'nearest';
}

// Convert km distance string to meters for API
const distanceToMeters = (distance?: string): number | undefined => {
  if (!distance || distance === '') return undefined;
  if (distance === '20+') return 100000;
  return parseInt(distance) * 1000;
};

// Haversine formula
const getDistanceKm = (
  origin: { lat: number; lng: number } | null,
  dest?: { lat: number; lng: number }
): number => {
  if (!origin || !dest) return 999;
  const R = 6371;
  const dLat = ((dest.lat - origin.lat) * Math.PI) / 180;
  const dLon = ((dest.lng - origin.lng) * Math.PI) / 180;
  const a =
    Math.sin(dLat / 2) ** 2 +
    Math.cos((origin.lat * Math.PI) / 180) *
      Math.cos((dest.lat * Math.PI) / 180) *
      Math.sin(dLon / 2) ** 2;
  return R * 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
};

export const useProviderBrowse = () => {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [debouncedSearch, setDebouncedSearch] = useState('');
  const [filters, setFilters] = useState<ProviderBrowseFilters>({
    serviceType: '',
    distance: '',
    sortBy: 'newest',
  });
  const [userLocation, setUserLocation] = useState<{ lat: number; lng: number } | null>(null);
  const [locationError, setLocationError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // ✅ Get real user location on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const getLocation = async () => {
      try {
        const { status } = await Location.requestForegroundPermissionsAsync();
        if (status !== 'granted') {
          setLocationError('Location permission denied');
          return;
        }
        const location = await Location.getCurrentPositionAsync({
          accuracy: Location.Accuracy.Balanced,
        });
        setUserLocation({
          lat: location.coords.latitude,
          lng: location.coords.longitude,
        });
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Location error:', error);
        setLocationError('Could not get location');
      }
    };
    getLocation();
  }, []);

  // Debounce search
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => setDebouncedSearch(searchQuery), 500);
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [searchQuery]);

  // Build API params
  const queryParams = useMemo(() => {
    const params: Record<string, any> = {
      status: 'OPEN',
      limit: 50,
      page: 1,
    };

    if (debouncedSearch) params.searchTerm = debouncedSearch;

    // ✅ Pass lat/lng from real location
    if (userLocation) {
      params.lat = userLocation.lat;
      params.lng = userLocation.lng;
    }

    // ✅ Pass maxDistance in meters when distance filter selected
    const maxDistance = distanceToMeters(filters.distance);
    if (maxDistance) params.maxDistance = maxDistance;

    // Service type filter
    if (filters.serviceType) {
      params.serviceType = filters.serviceType.toUpperCase().replace(/-/g, '_');
    }

    // Sort
    switch (filters.sortBy) {
      case 'newest':
        params.sortBy = 'createdAt';
        params.sortOrder = 'desc';
        break;
      case 'price-low':
        params.sortBy = 'budget';
        params.sortOrder = 'asc';
        break;
      case 'price-high':
        params.sortBy = 'budget';
        params.sortOrder = 'desc';
        break;
    }

    return params;
  }, [debouncedSearch, filters, userLocation]);

  const { data: rawTasks, isLoading, isFetching, error, refetch } = useBrowseTasksQuery(queryParams);

  const transformedTasks = useMemo((): TaskItem[] => {
    if (!rawTasks) return [];
    return rawTasks.map(transformBrowseTaskToTaskItem);
  }, [rawTasks]);

  // Client-side nearest sort (since API may not support it)
  const results = useMemo((): TaskItem[] => {
    if (filters.sortBy === 'nearest') {
      return [...transformedTasks].sort((a, b) => {
        const distA = getDistanceKm(userLocation, a.coordinates);
        const distB = getDistanceKm(userLocation, b.coordinates);
        return distA - distB;
      });
    }
    return transformedTasks;
  }, [transformedTasks, filters.sortBy, userLocation]);

  const getDistance = useCallback(
    (taskId: string): number => {
      const task = results.find((t) => t.id === taskId);
      return getDistanceKm(userLocation, task?.coordinates);
    },
    [results, userLocation]
  );

  const updateSearchQuery = useCallback((query: string) => setSearchQuery(query), []);

  const updateFilters = useCallback((newFilters: Partial<ProviderBrowseFilters>) => {
    setFilters((prev) => ({ ...prev, ...newFilters }));
  }, []);

  const clearFilters = useCallback(() => {
    setFilters({ serviceType: '', distance: '', sortBy: 'newest' });
  }, []);

  return {
    searchQuery,
    filters,
    results,
    isLoading,
    isFetching,
    isError: !!error,
    updateSearchQuery,
    updateFilters,
    clearFilters,
    getDistance,
    userLocation,
    locationError,
    resultCount: results.length,
    hasActiveFilters: filters.serviceType !== '' || filters.distance !== '',
    hasResults: results.length > 0,
    refetch,
  };
};

Step 3: Update BrowseFilterModal.tsx — remove price range

tsx
// Remove price range state and UI entirely
const BrowseFilterModal = ({ visible, onClose, onApply, initialFilters }: BrowseFilterModalProps) => {
  const bottomSheetRef = useRef<BottomSheet>(null);
  const [serviceType, setServiceType] = useState<ServiceType | ''>(initialFilters?.serviceType || '');
  const [distance, setDistance] = useState<string>(initialFilters?.distance || '');
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<string>(initialFilters?.sortBy || 'newest');

  // ... useEffect and handlers same as before

  const handleApply = () => {
    onApply({ serviceType, distance, sortBy });
    onClose();
  };

  const handleReset = () => {
    setServiceType('');
    setDistance('');
    setSortBy('newest');
  };

  // ... backdrop and snapPoints same

  return (
    <BottomSheet
      ref={bottomSheetRef}
      index={-1}              // ← always -1, useEffect controls it
      snapPoints={['60%', '75%']}
      enablePanDownToClose
      backdropComponent={renderBackdrop}
      onClose={handleClose}
      handleStyle={styles.bottomSheetHandle}
      backgroundStyle={styles.bottomSheetBackground}>
      <BottomSheetView style={styles.bottomSheetContent}>
        <View className="flex-row items-start justify-between border-b border-gray-200 px-5 pb-4 pt-2">
          <View className="flex-1 gap-1 pr-4">
            <LabelPrimary text="Filters" style={{ fontSize: 18, fontFamily: 'Nunito-BoldItalic' }} />
            <Subtitle text="Find tasks that match your preferences" style={{ fontSize: 12, color: '#6B7280' }} />
          </View>
          <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleClose} className="p-1">
            <Ionicons name="close" size={24} color="#4B5563" />
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>

        <View className="flex-1 px-5 pt-5">
          <View className="mb-5">
            <InputLabel text="Service Type" />
            <BrowseCustomPicker
              selectedValue={serviceType}
              onValueChange={(v) => setServiceType(v as ServiceType | '')}
              options={serviceOptions}
              placeholder="Select Service"
            />
          </View>

          <View className="mb-5">
            <InputLabel text="Distance" />
            <BrowseCustomPicker
              selectedValue={distance}
              onValueChange={setDistance}
              options={DISTANCE_OPTIONS}
              placeholder="Any Distance"
            />
          </View>

          <View className="mb-5">
            <InputLabel text="Sort By" />
            <BrowseCustomPicker
              selectedValue={sortBy}
              onValueChange={setSortBy}
              options={SORT_OPTIONS}
              placeholder="Sort By"
            />
          </View>
        </View>

        <View className="flex-row gap-3 px-5 pb-5 pt-2">
          <OutlineButton
            title="Reset"
            borderColor="#DC3545"
            textColor="#DC3545"
            onPress={handleReset}
            className="flex-1"
            style={{ borderRadius: 12, backgroundColor: '#DC35451A' }}
          />
          <PrimaryButton onPress={handleApply} title="Apply" style={{ borderRadius: 12, flex: 1 }} />
        </View>
      </BottomSheetView>
    </BottomSheet>
  );
};

Step 4: Update ProviderBrowseScreen — show location status

Add this after hasActiveFilters block:

tsx
// Destructure locationError from hook:
const { ..., locationError, isFetching } = useProviderBrowse();

// Add after the hasActiveFilters View:
{locationError && (
  <View className="flex-row items-center gap-2 bg-amber-50 px-4 py-2">
    <Ionicons name="location-outline" size={14} color="#D97706" />
    <Text className="font-nunito text-xs text-amber-700">
      Location unavailable — distance filters disabled
    </Text>
  </View>
)}

// Add fetching overlay to FlatList wrapper:
<View style={{ flex: 1 }}>
  <FlatList ... />
  {isFetching && !isLoading && (
    <View style={{
      position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0,
      backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)',
      alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
    }}>
      <ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#2B7FFF" />
    </View>
  )}
</View>

The flow is now: on mount → request location permission → get coordinates → pass lat/lng to API → when distance filter selected, pass maxDistance in meters → API returns only tasks within that radius.

// /app/customer/(tabs)/chat/index.tsx
import React from 'react';
import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import CustomHeader from '@/components/ui/shared/CustomHeader';
import ChatList from '@/components/ui/chat/ChatList';
import { useChatList } from '@/hooks/chat/useChatList';
import { LAYOUT } from '@/constants/constants';

const CustomerChatList = () => {
  const { conversations, isLoading, refetch } = useChatList();

  return (
    <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} className="flex-1 bg-customerBg">
      <CustomHeader
        height={LAYOUT.screen.customHeaderHeight}
        backgroundColor="#FFFFFF"
        title="Chats"
        subtitle=""
        backButton={true}
      />
      <ChatList conversations={conversations} isLoading={isLoading} onRefresh={refetch} />
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
};

export default CustomerChatList;

// /app/provider/(tabs)/chat/index.tsx
import React from 'react';
import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import CustomHeader from '@/components/ui/shared/CustomHeader';
import ChatList from '@/components/ui/chat/ChatList';
import { useChatList } from '@/hooks/chat/useChatList';
import { LAYOUT } from '@/constants/constants';

const ProviderChatList = () => {
  const { conversations, isLoading, refetch } = useChatList();

  return (
    <SafeAreaView edges={['top']} className="flex-1 bg-customerBg">
      <CustomHeader
        height={LAYOUT.screen.customHeaderHeight}
        backgroundColor="#FFFFFF"
        title="Chats"
        subtitle=""
        backButton={true}
      />
      <ChatList conversations={conversations} isLoading={isLoading} onRefresh={refetch} />
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
};

export default ProviderChatList;


// /hooks/chat/useChatList.ts
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { useGetConversationsQuery } from '@/store/api/chatApi';
import { socketService } from '@/services/socketService';
import { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';
import { useDispatch } from 'react-redux';
import { chatApi } from '@/store/api/chatApi';

export interface ChatConversationUI {
  id: string;
  otherUserId: string;
  otherUserName: string;
  otherUserAvatar: string;
  lastMessage: string;
  lastMessageTime: string;
  unreadCount: number;
  isVerified: boolean;
  userRole: 'customer' | 'provider';
}

export const useChatList = () => {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const userRole = user?.role as 'customer' | 'provider';
  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const { data: conversations = [], isLoading, isError, refetch } = useGetConversationsQuery();

  const uiConversations: ChatConversationUI[] = conversations.map((conv) => ({
    id: conv._id,
    otherUserId: conv.userData._id,
    otherUserName: conv.userData.name,
    otherUserAvatar: conv.userData.profile_image || '',
    lastMessage: conv.lastMessage?.text || 'No messages yet',
    lastMessageTime: conv.lastMessageAt ? formatTime(conv.lastMessageAt) : '',
    unreadCount: conv.unseenMsg || 0,
    isVerified: false,
    userRole: userRole === 'customer' ? 'provider' : 'customer',
  }));

  useEffect(() => {
    const initSocket = async () => {
      await socketService.connect();

      socketService.onConversationUpdate((data) => {
        console.log('📨 Conversation updated:', data?.conversationId);
        // Invalidate cache to force refetch
        dispatch(chatApi.util.invalidateTags(['Chat']));
      });
    };

    initSocket();

    return () => {
      socketService.offConversationUpdate();
    };
  }, [refetch, dispatch]);

  return {
    conversations: uiConversations,
    isLoading,
    isError,
    refetch,
  };
};

function formatTime(dateString: string): string {
  const date = new Date(dateString);
  const now = new Date();
  const diffMs = now.getTime() - date.getTime();
  const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));

  if (diffDays === 0) {
    return date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
  } else if (diffDays === 1) {
    return 'Yesterday';
  } else if (diffDays < 7) {
    return `${diffDays} days ago`;
  }
  return date.toLocaleDateString();
}


// /store/api/chatApi.ts
import { baseApi } from './baseApi';

export interface Conversation {
  _id: string;
  createdAt: string;
  lastMessage?: {
    _id: string;
    text: string;
    msgByUserId: string;
    msgByUserModel: string;
    receiverId: string;
    receiverModel: string;
    seen: boolean;
    createdAt: string;
  };
  lastMessageAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  userData: {
    _id: string;
    name: string;
    email: string;
    profile_image: string;
  };
  unseenMsg: number;
}

export interface Message {
  _id: string;
  text: string;
  msgByUserId: string;
  msgByUserModel: string;
  receiverId: string;
  receiverModel: string;
  conversationId: string;
  imageUrl?: string[];
  pdfUrl?: string[];
  videoUrl?: string[];
  seen: boolean;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  userDetails?: {
    _id: string;
    name: string;
    email: string;
    profile_image: string;
  };
  isMyMessage?: boolean;
}

export const chatApi = baseApi.injectEndpoints({
  endpoints: (builder) => ({
    getConversations: builder.query<Conversation[], void>({
      query: () => '/conversation/get-chat-list', // ← correct endpoint
      transformResponse: (response: any) => {
        console.log('📡 Conversations response:', JSON.stringify(response?.data?.data?.length));
        const data = response?.data?.data || []; // ← correct path: data.data
        return Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
      },
      transformErrorResponse: (error: any) => {
        console.log('❌ Conversations error:', JSON.stringify(error));
        return error;
      },
      providesTags: ['Chat'],
    }),

    getMessages: builder.query<Message[], string>({
      query: (conversationId) => `/message/get-messages/${conversationId}`, // ← correct endpoint
      transformResponse: (response: any) => {
        console.log('📡 Messages response count:', response?.data?.result?.length);
        const data = response?.data?.result || [];
        return Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
      },
      transformErrorResponse: (error: any) => {
        console.log('❌ Messages error:', JSON.stringify(error));
        return error;
      },
      providesTags: (result, error, conversationId) => [{ type: 'Chat', id: conversationId }],
    }),
  }),
});

export const { useGetConversationsQuery, useGetMessagesQuery } = chatApi;
